    "id" integer NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
    "forum_id" integer NOT NULL,
    "subject" varchar(255) NOT NULL
);
ALTER TABLE "topic"
ADD CONSTRAINT forum_id FOREIGN KEY ("forum_id")
REFERENCES "forum" ("id");

values (2, 'D''artagnian');

#[derive(Debug)]
pub enum State {
    Start,
    Transient,
    Closed,
}

impl From<&'a str> for State {
    fn from(s: &'a str) -> Self {
        match s {
            "start" => State::Start,
            "closed" => State::Closed,
            _ => unreachable!(),
        }
    }
}
